Metadata.ExomizerCommand: exomizer sfx 0x1770 "TURBO64-1770" -Di_irq_exit=1 -s "inc $d030 lsr $d011" -f "w1: bit $d011 bpl w1 w2: bit $d011 bmi w2 jsr $fda3 rol $d011 dec $d030" -x "inc $d020" -o "Turbo 64.prg"
Metadata.Notes: To remove the manual protection from the game, the BNE $1AC4 instruction at $1AC0 has been changed to BNE $1AD6 instead.
